status.description: ALERT when the total, transaction date, or vendor cannot be determined without guessing. Otherwise OK.

total.description: The final amount paid or charged, formatted with exactly two decimal places and no currency symbol, or null when unavailable.

total_source.description: Whether the total was clearly printed, calculated exactly from fully legible information, or unavailable.

date.description: The actual purchase, transaction, sale, payment, invoice, or check date formatted as MM/DD/YY, or null when unavailable or ambiguous.

vendor.description: The person, business, organization, agency, or service receiving payment. State of the Arc Electric must never be returned as the vendor.

po_number.description: A four-digit PO number extracted only from an original filename consisting of exactly four digits followed by one file extension. Leading zeros must be preserved and 0000 is valid. Null for every other filename format.

category.description: The single allowed category that most closely fits the expense. This field must never be null.

description.description: A mandatory description of the purchase or payment. When the exact product is unclear, copy the visible receipt line-item text or provide a truthful generic description.

alert_message.description: When status is ALERT, begins with *ALERT* and explains which required fields could not be determined and why. Null when status is OK.

total.description: The exact visible total text, exact arithmetic used, or an explanation of why the total is unavailable.

date.description: The exact visible date text and its label, or an explanation of why the correct transaction date is unavailable.

vendor.description: The exact visible identifying text supporting the vendor, or an explanation of why the vendor is unavailable.

po_number.description: The original filename and an explanation of whether it produced a valid four-digit PO number.
